steps.title: Identify what the question requires
steps.content: The question asks for the year when both museums individually had their highest number of visits—meaning the same year must be each museum’s own peak, not just the year with the highest combined total.

steps.title: Find each museum's peak year individually
steps.content:
National Museum of the American Indian visits by year:
2016: 1.1M  |  2017: 1.2M  |  2018: 1.1M  |  2019: 0.96M
Peak: 2017

National Museum of African American History and Culture visits by year:
2016: 0.73M  |  2017: 2.4M  |  2018: 1.9M  |  2019: 2.0M
Peak: 2017

Both museums individually reached their highest visit counts in 2017. That matches choice D — D is correct.
